info.description: Kolaleaf AUD-NGN remittance API. Machine-readable contract generated from runtime Zod schemas — the same schemas used by every route handler for validation.
info.title: Kolaleaf API

post.summary: Disable 2FA (requires current TOTP / SMS challenge / backup code)
Commit a 2FA enrollment started by /setup
Rotate 2FA backup codes; returns new raw codes once
Kick off 2FA enrollment (TOTP or SMS)
Start an email-change flow; sends a verification code to the new address
Rotate the password; force-logs-out every OTHER session

get.summary: Get the authenticated user account summary

patch.summary: Update mutable account fields (displayName + AU address)

post.summary: Add a phone identifier and issue an SMS verification code
Remove a phone identifier (blocked while SMS 2FA is active)
Consume an SMS code and mark the phone identifier verified
Mark a ComplianceReport as filed with AUSTRAC
Mark a FailedEmail row as resolved

get.summary: List current + historical rates for every active corridor

post.summary: Override the customer + wholesale rate for a corridor
Pay a referral reward

get.summary: Fetch a single transfer with event history

200.description: Transfer marked refunded with an external operator reference

post.summary: Mark a NEEDS_MANUAL transfer as manually refunded
Retry a NEEDS_MANUAL transfer (route to PROCESSING_NGN)
Record a privacy-first mobile KPI event

400.description: Malformed JSON or business-logic failure (pending_not_verified / claim_expired / etc.)

post.summary: Consume a verified email-or-phone claim and create the User account
Register authenticated iOS device attestation state

202.description: Password OK but email unverified — code issued

429.description: Rate-limited (reason: rate_limited). Retry-After header carries seconds.

500.description: Internal failure (reason: internal_error). Underlying error is logged but not exposed.

post.summary: Authenticate with identifier + password
Revoke the current session

200.description: Generic success regardless of whether the email exists

post.summary: Request a password-reset email (always 200 to avoid enumeration)
Resend an email-verification code (always 200)

400.description: Malformed JSON or token expired / used

post.summary: Consume a reset token and set a new password

200.description: Code issued (or silently skipped for enumeration-proof reasons)

post.summary: Send a 6-digit email verification code
Verify a TOTP / SMS / backup 2FA code for the current session

400.description: Malformed JSON or code reason (wrong_code / expired / used / no_token)

post.summary: Validate a 6-digit wizard code and open the 30-min claim window
Verify an email with a 6-digit code and open a session

get.summary: List banks for a destination country

409.description: No active KYC application, or KYC is already verified

post.summary: Mint a fresh Sumsub WebSDK access token for an in-review applicant

409.description: KYC already verified / in review (reason: kyc_already_verified | kyc_already_in_review)

429.description: Rate-limited (reason: rate_limited). Retry-After header carries seconds.

500.description: KYC initiation failed (reason: kyc_initiate_failed). Underlying error is logged.

post.summary: Kick off Sumsub KYC and return a WebSDK access token

200.description: Fresh Sumsub access token + URL; user is now IN_REVIEW

409.description: KYC retry not currently valid (reason: kyc_not_rejected | kyc_no_application)

post.summary: Re-initiate a REJECTED KYC application with a fresh access token

get.summary: Get the current user's KYC status
Public rate lookup by ISO currency pair
Deprecated: get a rate by corridor id
List recipients for the current user

post.summary: Create a recipient owned by the current user
Resolve a bank account to its holder name via the payout provider

delete.summary: Delete a recipient owned by the current user

get.summary: List transfers for the authenticated user

403.description: Email unverified or KYC not approved

post.summary: Create a new AUD→NGN transfer

get.summary: Fetch a transfer owned by the current user

post.summary: Cancel a user-owned transfer (pre-AUD-received window only)

403.description: Not the transfer owner, email unverified, or KYC not verified

409.description: Transfer is not in CREATED state

post.summary: Issue a PayID for a CREATED transfer (owner only)
